calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Continued To Jul-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Bassin for and with Fanyela Weinberg.

The Court suggested that the assets be distributed out of the Trust, that they bifurcate and deal with the abatement issue on the petition for instructions and have it carried out as part of the Trust, that they have a new inventory showing no assets and that they file an amended petition to terminate probate for lack of assets. The First and Final Account and Distribution was continued to July 10, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the amended petition. Mr. Bassin is to prepare an order with regard to the abatement issue.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Continued To Jun-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Bassin for and with Fanyela Weinberg.

The Court stated that the issue of the Daughter/abatement needs to be raised in the Trust. The accounting petition was continued to June 12, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to figure out what to do proceedurely in order to close the Estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-01-2012 Continued To May-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Continued To May-01-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-10-294076 The Ana Dimitrescu Revocable Trust.

Appearances: Scott Bassin for and with Fanyela Weinberg. Andrew Wilson for Danny Ansems.

There is no objection to the petition for probate by any Party. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. The Petition for Instructions on the Trust matter was continued to August 24, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
